summary: Split the over-broad cluster into two families. #37634 remains the best live non-security canonical issue for the `workspaceAccess: "none"` writable-workspace regression and still needs a fresh credited fix PR. #31331 stays separate as the Docker-outside-of-Docker bind-source bug.
